deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip analysis. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K. Projected profit $42-62K. Template building project for property analysis tool.
deals.next: Build first analysis sheet template from this deal

logs.m: Investor sent deal via link. Used as basis for analysis tool development.

deals.title: Borregas Land
deals.notes: Land/acreage development opportunity. Isaac Linares development interest (~$150K offer). Mobile home project with veteran units. Title defect: incomplete legal description. Correction Deed in progress.
deals.next: Confirm listing extension decision with sisters. Present Isaac development offer formally.

logs.m: Price adjustment needed. Follow up with prior buyers. Isaac expanded concept to 10-acre mobile home lots. Josh LT potential partner.
Title defect confirmed: Deed incomplete. Attorney Van Hutchins preparing Correction Deed. Jennifer Ball taking initiative on title issues.
Sisters excited about Isaac development angle. Discussed mobile home project with veteran component.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: VA loan underwater by $93-143K. Vacant 6 months. Double-carrying ($2,843/mo mortgage + Pearl Brewery apartment). 208 DOM. Three paths: short sale, VA assumption, or price reduction with cash at close.
deals.next: Call broker first, then present three paths to sellers.

logs.m: Call completed. Chandler laid off - strong hardship docs for short sale. Matt and Chandler leaning toward Path A (short sale).
Email sent with market analysis and three options. Payoff confirmed $489,501 as of 3/13/26. Path C drop to $518,999 highlighted.
Stopped by property. Landscaping contacted. Yard work in progress.
Outside agent showing. Lawn care referral received - Morales Tree Trimming.

deals.title: Howell - Buyer
deals.notes: Rental being sold. Pivoted to new construction search. Pre-approval pending with Zach Schaphorst. No HOA requirement. Rate buydowns and incentives angle.
deals.next: Confirm pre-approval status with Zach. Set up new construction search platform.

logs.m: Sent showingnew.com/chrisdrawdy. Rental property being sold, rents going up. 916 Marriott failed inspection.
Text from Mike - rental being sold. Introduced new construction idea. They were receptive.
Connected with Zach Schaphorst. Paid off debt. 30-day wait for credit pull.

deals.title: Brown - Seller Prep
deals.notes: 485 W FM 462, Frio County. Divorce sale. 1809 sqft, 3BR/2BA, 4.05 acres. Payoff ~$257K. Need $285-290K to walk with proceeds. Recommended list $295K.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter. Schedule professional photos. Confirm acreage and renovation status.

logs.m: Meeting at property 10am. CMA pulled, payoff confirmed $255,578 as of Feb 2026. Net sheet built.
Prior clients from VA renovation loan purchase. Divorce - need to finish and sell. Colton looking for contractor work.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA, motivated seller relocating to NC. Hairline foundation crack flagged. MLS live May 14. First showing completed. Investor offer $176,300 received.
deals.next: Monitor showings. Roof/fascia decision pending insurance adjuster.

logs.m: Texted Jose and Katy about investor cash offer $176,300. 4th showing scheduled May 23 at 1:30pm.
MLS live. Sign and lockbox dropped. Canvassed neighborhood. First showing feedback received from MK.
Listing agreement signed. Photos from ATG received - 43 photos plus floorplans.
Listing consultation on-site 11am with Isaac present. Meeting went well. Foundation crack discussed.

deals.title: Coughran Rd 8449
deals.notes: Estate cash sale $152K. Lien blocker resolved Apr 21. Cleared and funded Apr 26. Officially closed Apr 27.
deals.next: Deliver joy gift basket and thank you notes.

logs.m: Officially closed and funded. Commission earned.
Cleared and funded confirmation.
Fernando Castillo signed lien release at mobile notary. Delivered to Chicago Title.

deals.title: Green Bliss Rental
deals.notes: 8527 Green Bliss, Grace Gardens. Brand new 2025 Lennar. 3BR/2BA, 1535 sqft. Rent $1595/month. No pets, 12-month lease. Listing agreement must go out today.
deals.next: Finalize listing agreement in Skyslope. Get vinyl signs from Opie.

logs.m: Photos identified as priority. Sign drop happening today. Linktree listing link to be set up.
Jimbo replied with all 12 questions answered. Rent $1595, 12-month lease, full co-op commission confirmed.
Talked to Jimbo on road to Devine. His son made flyers - need to review.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned foreclosure. Damage post-possession. Renovation by HouzzPro/Matt Toney in progress. Utilities being set up. Listing agreement needed to Priority Bank.
deals.next: Get transformer number on-site tomorrow. Submit Medina Electric application. Finalize listing agreement for Jerry and Ray.

logs.m: Cleanup active. Floor demo complete. Drywall cut. Medina Electric and EMCSUD confirmed. Email sent to Kelly with utility info.
Listing agreement needs to go to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham.
On-site visit. Met Bryce (dumpster contractor). Wife is active military - VA buyer lead.
Met Matt Toney in his office. Connected directly with Jerry Sadler on phone call.

deals.title: Tilden 20 acres
deals.notes: 20-acre hunting property. Price reduced to $117,500. Michael Rodriguez offer stalled (no earnest money). Steve cleared property. No urgency. Lead with net after close on next offer.
deals.next: Follow up with Steve as clearing wraps up. When next offer comes, lead with net after close.

logs.m: Steve signed amendment. Price adjusted to $117,500. MLS updated. Commission box correction still needed.
Steve sent new photos. Clearing complete. Drone footage next content priority.
Clearing complete. Photos being posted to social media. First offer dead.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F
leads.detail: Garden community connection. Grief to healing through plants story. Content collaboration potential with permission.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission to share story (content). Keep nurturing.

leads.title: Isaac - Investor
leads.detail: Investor met in person. Buy box unknown. Likely Schertz area based on context. Full Sage intake needed.
leads.next: Full intake call - buy box, budget, timeline, flip vs hold strategy.

leads.title: Christina Shine
leads.detail: 13810 Tangle Tree St. Met at garden event May 9. 90% complete, struggling to finish. Already with realtor but open to as-is sale. Pre-market buyer opportunity.
leads.next: Follow up on finishing progress. Offer to promote to network. If stalls on finishing, revisit as-is conversation.

leads.title: Miss Pat Neighbor Son
leads.detail: Neighbor directly behind Miss Pat. Deceased owner was avid gardener. Son now owns property. Not yet contacted. Probate/inherited property potential.
leads.next: Get more info from Miss Pat - son name and contact. Reach out as neighbor and gardener first.

leads.title: Bryce - VA Buyer
leads.detail: Dumpster contractor at 181 CR 7751. Wife is active military - VA eligible. Recently moved from Ohio. Renting, looking to buy in San Antonio area.
leads.next: Get contact info when on site. Qualify wife for VA eligibility. Connect with VA-approved lender.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Downline agent Schertz/Cibolo. Has buyer interested in property needing work. Unique situation. Details pending.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome - get full details on buyer and property. Understand the situation before next steps.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship - helped Brandon get started in real estate. Two active opportunities: (1) Green Bliss rental listing (uncle Jimbo property) (2) Milagros Stringer (Brandon mom) new construction buyer in Grace Gardens.
leads.next: Send PM company options to Brandon. Confirm Milagros signed buyer rep. Set up Grace Gardens visit with both.

leads.title: Milagros Stringer
leads.detail: Brandon mom. Budget $50K down, target ~$1000/month payment. New construction buyer not locked into Grace Gardens. Builder rate buydowns key angle.
leads.next: Confirm buyer rep signed. Pull inventory across all builders. Set up model home visits with Chris registered as agent on first visit.

leads.title: Kurt - Neighbor Prospect
leads.detail: Neighbor around corner from 9815 Conbes. Wants intel on nearby listing under contract at $275K. Possible seller lead.
leads.next: Pull CMA for Kurt area. Follow up with listing agent on 9815 Conbes details. Report back to Kurt.
